title: Marqeta Flex: An Industry-Leading Buy Now, Pay Later Solution
text: Marqeta Flex: BNPL Product Overview. What it is: Marqeta Flex is a Buy Now, Pay Later solution designed to integrate BNPL loan options into payment apps and digital wallets. The platform enables consumers to access financing choices at checkout. Key Partners: The solution is being developed collaboratively with BNPL providers Affirm and Klarna, plus payments platform Branch. How it Works: When users select a Pay Later option within participating payment applications, the system generates personalized quotes from multiple BNPL providers, allowing customers to select their preferred option. Primary Benefits. Consumers: Access multiple BNPL options tailored to individual purchase needs with flexible payment choices. BNPL Providers: Expanded consumer distribution and real-time, personalized loan offerings. Card Issuers/Digital Wallets: A powerful solution that drives payment volume through a single integration accessing various global BNPL providers while maintaining customization capabilities. Core Value Proposition: Marqeta Flex prioritizes simplicity by connecting consumers with multiple BNPL providers simultaneously, enabling broader financial accessibility through existing payment platforms.
